Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-13 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's data shows TNGX and LINC as the top two momentum performers, with TNGX commanding rank #1 with a composite score of 97.6. TNGX displays extraordinary returns across all timeframes, most dramatically with 784.77% over one year and 154.82% over six months, while maintaining perfect positioning above all major moving averages (SMA 30/50/100/200). The consistency of TNGX's momentum is reinforced by strong ratio passes (4/5) and exceptional resilience on down SPY days with a score of 99.76, indicating it held gains even when the broader market declined. LINC follows as the second-ranked candidate with more modest but still substantial returns (145.8% one-year, 87.9% six-month) and similarly strong SMA alignment, though its one-year outperformance versus SPY (126.96%) significantly lags TNGX's 765.93%, suggesting TNGX's momentum is both longer-lasting and more independent of market direction. Both tickers show low correlation to defensive sectors (negative correlations to XLP, XLB, XLI), indicating their strength derives from sector-specific or fundamental drivers rather than broad market beta.
